  "clarification_question": "Which focus should I prioritize for this paragraph: (A) writing polish and tone (R1.6), (B) argument coherence and claim-evidence alignment with overclaim checks (R1.2, R1.3, RX.2), or (C) high-level reframing of the core claim without editing (R1.1)?",

}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I prioritize for this paragraph: (A) writing polish and tone (R1.6), (B) argument coherence and claim-evidence alignment with overclaim checks (R1.2, R1.3, RX.2), or (C) high-level reframing of the core claim without editing (R1.1)?

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph mixes scoped evaluations with broader conclusions, so checking the internal logic from premises to conclusions is central.
rationale.R1.3: The reported precision/recall figures and stated evaluation scope must align with the strength of the claims made in the paragraph.
rationale.R1.6: The request could intend sentence-level clarity and concision improvements for a single paragraph.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly surfacing uncertainties and limits in the stated claims is important for responsible interpretation.
rationale.RX.2: The domain is safety-critical, so preventing overstated generality or performance beyond what is supported is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The work should stay strictly within assessing this provided paragraph rather than broader paper content or experiments.
rationale.RX.4: Claims about diagnostic reliability in EV battery systems carry potential safety impacts, warranting extra caution.
rationale.RX.5: Any assessments should be traceable directly to the text and numbers present in the provided paragraph.
